description: The usa.gdt dataset is open in Gretl, containing real US quarterly macroeconomic data from the Federal Reserve FRED database (1984Q1 to 2009Q3) with variables 'gdp' (real GDP in billions of chained 2005 dollars) and 'inf' (CPI inflation rate, annualized %). Perform an Augmented Dickey-Fuller (ADF) unit root test on the 'gdp' variable using default settings to test for a unit root. Save the resulting test statistics and critical values to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/adf_test_results.txt.

metadata.data_source: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis FRED database, via Hill et al. POE5
